violations.description: Ensure role attribute has an appropriate value for the element
violations.help: ARIA role should be appropriate for the element

nodes.html:
<button type="button" tabindex="0" onclick="CookieInformation.declineAllCategories()" aria-label="Avvis alle" id="declineButton" class="coi-banner__decline" role="alert" aria-atomic="true" style="display: flex;">
            Avvis alle
          </button>
